summary: Generated exactly one runnable helper script artifact that wraps the reviewed PDF-to-Excel delegate with portable path resolution, preflight PDF discovery, dry-run/zero-input partial handling, explicit timeout control, stdout/sidecar JSON report parsing, success evidence gates, and structured reviewable summary output.
notes: The script is parameter-driven and uses the provided input_dir and output_xlsx values as defaults while remaining overridable from the CLI.
It preserves readonly/best-effort reviewable semantics by delegating only to the reviewed repository script when available and by keeping dry-run or zero-PDF discovery outcomes as partial.
It enforces stronger success attestation than subprocess exit code plus output existence alone.
